category_sources: source_facts.description says enable PKCS#11 tokens with GnuPG; official homepage describes a replacement smart-card daemon for GnuPG.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name, source_facts.repo, and executable name identify gnupg-pkcs11-scd.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo points to the official GitHub repository, whose README is the best official documentation surface; source_facts.homepage is the official project homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/alonbl/gnupg-pkcs11-scd, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official homepage identify GnuPG PKCS#11 token/smart-card integration.
